name: PluresLM Memory
description: Read-path memory recall for OpenClaw backed by @plures/pluresdb-native. Stage A: recall/search/status only — no write path, no flush, no slot mutation beyond the exclusive memory capability.

dbPath.description: Absolute path to the PluresDB store directory (the folder containing conf/db/blobs/snap.*). When omitted, the memory capability stays inert and reports unavailable.

embeddingModel.description: HuggingFace embedding model id used for vector recall.

vectorThreshold.description: Cosine-similarity floor (0-1) for vector recall hits.

maxResults.description: Default maximum number of recall hits to return.
